name: pixijs
description: PixiJS v8 skill collection for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build and debug PixiJS v8 scenes.
interface.longDescription: PixiJS packages the upstream PixiJS v8 Codex skills for application setup, scene graph work, assets, events, rendering, filters, performance, migration, and project scaffolding.
defaultPrompt: Fix this PixiJS scene graph bug.
